programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A motorist struggles to break up a fistfight between drivers in New Jersey. A cyclist turns traffic vigilante in England and clashes with commuters. A runaway circling car heads toward its ejected driver in Montana. A police chase in Texas turns dire when the suspect plows through a shopping mall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A dispute over a saved parking space leads to a brawl in New York. On a bridge in Connecticut, a confrontation between a driver and pedestrians escalates quickly. A sports car driver in Georgia turns off his traction control and pays the price into oncoming traffic. A minivan runs a red light as a man in a mobility scooter is crossing in California. In Malaysia, two vehicles engage in a fierce back-and-forth on the highway.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: At an Oregon summer camp, an employee confronts a delivery driver, and simple questions quickly turn into a heated clash. On the Los Angeles Metro, a mysterious argument between two riders erupts into a physical brawl. At a French Airport, armed forces storm a plane to forcibly remove an allegedly out-of-control bachelor party. In a Columbus parking lot, officers surround three individuals suspected of firing guns near a community pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In Chappell Hill, Texas, a fast-food employee is confronted after a customer believes he was commenting on her weight. In Joliet, Illinois, an early-morning noise complaint at a gym escalates into a clash with police. In Okotoks, Canada, a quiet day at a phone repair shop is shattered when a car crashes through the storefront. And in Botswana, a couple's safari celebration takes a terrifying turn when an elephant charges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: In California, a flower shop owner livestreams a standoff with a customer who appears to deny a simple request; at a Florida airport, a passenger's identification snafu escalates to a confrontation with police.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Customer Wars
programme.desc: A customer attempts to return an allegedly faulty phone card without a receipt in Ohio; a fight between two women, allegedly over one of the holiday season's hottest gaming consoles, turns physical in North Carolina.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: At a red light in Arizona, a car sideswipes the door on another driver's vehicle during a heated road rage encounter; two drivers get into a yelling match as they attempt to squeeze by each other on a narrow street in the Boston suburbs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: A car allegedly fleeing a hit-and-run on a San Diego highway crashes into a disabled vehicle; in Washington, a man who takes on alleged late-night thieves in his driveway gets slammed by their car.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 2026 Proof Silver Eagle: America's 250th Anniversary Release
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a historic release - the first-ever 1776-2026 dual-date Proof Silver Eagle with Liberty Bell privy mark, struck in .999 silver for America's 250th Anniversary. A one-year-only issue collectors won't want to miss.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Two for the Price of Dust
programme.desc: The big guns come out in Riverside, but Rene isn't having any of it; Darrell presses his luck with a smaller locker and makes a neat profit; Dusty finds that once he gets going, it's hard to stop... so he just keeps reloading.

programme.desc: Ivy drags Isaiah to Victorville as punishment for getting Cs on his report card; Kenny wants to furnish his new house, but there are eight reasons standing in his way; not to be cheesy, but Lisa learns a lot.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Every search has a conclusion: whether it's finding a missing person or chasing a suspect on the run, a police K9 makes sure it ends with answers; K9 Pandora wastes no time bringing relief to a desperate family looking for a family member; K9s Jet and Cheney tag-team a fugitive who tears up the roadway and refuses to stop; K9 Karma shuts down a belligerent man fighting arrest; and K-9 Endo follows the scent straight to a dumpster.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.desc: Rene and Casey display their confidence by arriving with a caravan of trucks; Darrell hopes to distract his competitors with doughnuts; Jarrod and Brandi plan an anniversary party for their store.

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot and, when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer; with the help of the victim's daughter, prosecutors fight to restore her dignity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a beloved teacher is gunned down in broad daylight, Gwinnett detectives must track down the suspects, with only their getaway car's description; in the pursuit of justice, the prosecution must overcome the threat of a mistrial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.sub-title: Room for the Night; Down and Out
programme.desc: Police investigate the killing of a man in a New Orleans motel room; a night of drinking in Tulsa, Okla., sparks a murderous rage, resulting in a man being stabbed 21 times.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In New Orleans, detectives make a gruesome discovery inside a car that was set on fire; Det. Ryan Vaught hopes the last person who spoke to the victim can lead him to the killer.

programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., detectives investigate the murder of a man with a troubled past, and they uncover a sinister plot.

programme.desc: When an attempted robbery ends in the murder of a retired sheriff's deputy, Gwinnett County detectives believe the suspects will strike again and race to track them down before more blood is shed.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a 20-year-old woman is found in her apartment a day after being brutally stabbed over 40 times. In Mobile, dozens of bullets are fired at a busy intersection leaving two men dead in a crashed car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.desc: Tulsa Detective Vernon McNeal confronts a group of childhood friends to find a killer who blindly shot into a bedroom window.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator plans to meet a 13-year-old at the mall, Detective Tony Godwin races to pull off his fastest ever takedown. Then, an FBI lead points to one home and two suspects. A predator's deviant secret is discovered in a church dumpster.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads detectives from Tulsa, Okla., on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
